title: dracaena ascendens
intro: Dracaena ascendens, also known as the 'Dragons Blood Tree', is a species of flowering plant in the family Asclepiadaceae. The medicinal properties of Dracaena ascendens include its sap, which has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as wound healing and skin conditions. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, due to its high concentration of antioxidants and flavonoids. In herbal preparations, the sap of Dracaena ascendens can be used to make a range of products, including ointments, tinctures, and salves, which are often used to treat skin conditions and promote wound healing.
